title: Einseinundzwanzig
description:
Early modpack for 1.21. 
Many structures to explore, ore generation and low tech storage systems are available. Vein mining gives ores and building blocks. 
CC turtles.
body:
## What?

Explore the world and collect resources. Build your base. Use computercraft turtles to mine your ore reeds and craft them into resources. Have a storage system. Use waystones and map teleporting to get around (and probably get hurt). Vanilla boats are not suitable for crossing oceans anymore. Use something else to get to the other coast. A "real" ship would be an idea.

Starting with 1.1.1 there is the small ships mod. It needs loader 0.16.0 and that is now available for client and server.

I am very curious how the new "unloaded activity" mod will do. (1.1.2)

## Computercraft, CC Tweaked

turtle programs:

harvest reeds:

pastebin get Aq1fyUNp aHarvester

(made by Kaikaku. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Oz2xnDchqFg )

convert reeds from mixed reeds chest to resources:

pastebin get kZaXMD1Y new-3x3

(made by myself, succeeds with any 3x3 recipes. It also converts slime to slime blocks to save space. It is not only for "Growable Ores" ore reeds.)

## The future

I'm still waiting for a plane mod, jetpacks and advanced storage system with autocrafting. These features will be added as soon as available. 

## How to fly

Atm there a two (very dangerous) hang glider mods for you to stunt over cliffs. One is craftable, the other one is available at the wandering trader. Teleporting home will not safe you from fall damage - but at least you are at home :)
Try to put the "sky walk" enchantment on your boots. Then walk over an edge to start levitating. That feels very close to jetpack experience. Take care.

## Server, huh?

Client versions are always able to connect to the same Server version successfully. However, trying to install a client version on a server will fail as there are client-only mods.

Sometimes there are two seemingly same files in the version files list. Hover over the download button to see if it is the server version. If you do not have a server then take the other download without "-server" in the tooltip.

## Online Server

My Online server now has another modpack and is not available for this modpack.

Online Server world is partly messed up due to experiments with "epic terrain" mod which is not in the pack anymore as of version 1.1.2. It may come back when it not mainly generates white terrain anymore. Online Server will be started from scratch wnen Create mod and Create structures mods are available. (For ores and structures. I want steam engines!)

## Versions notes

As of version 1.1.1 Fabric loader 0.16.0 is supported. This comes along with the small ships mod re-enabled and some other goodies.

If you update from an older version than 1.1.2 then you have to go to places and /sethome (your place) again. The way the home was stored has changed.

With version 1.1.4 the remote terminal from Tom's storage system needs to get reconnected if you had connected it with an older version before.

1.1.5 updated Fabric Loader to newest version. Updated 59 mods and disabled two now incompatible beauty-mods and their two library mods.
